texto: A Jesus Follower can explain our "One God in Three Persons" is like an "equilateral triangle". Both have three, conjoined, and distinct but identical parts. This is a simple way to help non-Followers of Jesus who struggle with the concept of Trinity to better understand the Three Personalities of our One Living God...God the Father, God the Son and God the Holy Spirit." ~ gfp '42©
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gary F. Patton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a fe. O trecho “A Jesus Follower can explain our "One God in Three Persons" is like an "equilateral triangle". Bo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, christianity, evangelism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de evangelism e jesus.
